tasks.name: Brownfield gotcha catch
tasks.type: objective (3 seeded defects + real Apolaki auth code)

opus48.note: core 3 + unseeded IDOR + matrix-bypass + consent-purpose; ALSO null-deref & brittle ===true. Most exhaustive, in fewer words.
Tighter numeric NFR budgets; data-minimization (discard PII post-OCR); every test wired to a deploy-gate.

sonnet5.note: Richer PH-domain edges: co-op/prepaid meters, Tagalog/English OCR, fraud-via-edit, OCR-vendor DPA, implausible-value ranges.

opus48.unique: case-sensitive method -> fail-open; ReDoS; policy-author vs runtime role-normalization mismatch.

sonnet5.unique: stateful g/y regex -> nondeterministic authz (the subtlest bug in the lab); uncaught-exception fails open.
